statement.headerDoc:
STEP ABC — Effective ABC bound: c^7 ≤ rad(abc)^11 for c ≤ N
  ===========================================================

  Conjecture (Oesterlé-Masser 1985, ABC conjecture, OPEN 41 years):
    ∀ ε > 0, ∃ C_ε such that for all coprime (a, b, c) with a + b = c,
      c ≤ C_ε · rad(abc)^{1+ε}.

  Status: Disputed. Mochizuki (2020 PRIMS) claims IUT proof; Stix-Scholze
  2018 identified a gap in Corollary 3.12; mainstream consensus: OPEN.

  Effective instance attacked here:
    The highest known quality q = log(c)/log(rad(abc)) ≈ 1.6299 (Reyssat 1988).
    Rei empirical sweep (c ≤ 10^4): max q =
